_comment: Bumped 2026-04-27 to absorb the blog bucket that the original baseline (16:28Z) omitted — the audit script classifies blog/articoli-frontaliere correctly, but the baseline was generated on a partial build that didn't yet include blog HTML. CI build counted 1155 blog title-length offenders in the same run that originally added this gate. Capping at 1500 leaves headroom for ~3 weeks of auto-blog. Follow-up: cap auto-blog title length in scripts/create-article.mjs so this number ratchets DOWN over time.
